title: Moderation Actions — Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
The moderation team has reviewed and resolved 6 abuse reports:

**Bans Issued (2):**
• spam_wave_42 — Phishing links in multiple channels (zero tolerance violation)
• toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers

**Warnings Issued (2):**
• new_member_17 — Off-topic posting (educational reminder)
• bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automation patterns

**Cleared (2):**
• core_maintainer — False positive from brigading
• trusted_helper — Dispute resolved without action

The queue is now clear. Reports are handled with proportionality and care.
